Variables.Name: TouchingActorEntryPosition
Variables.Description:
Position of the last actor to enter the collision cylinder.
	  This currently does not handle multiple actors affecting the foliage simultaneously.

Variables.Name: FoliageDamageImpulseScale
Variables.Description: Scales forces applied from damage events.

Variables.Name: FoliageTouchImpulseScale
Variables.Description: Scales forces applied from touch events.

Variables.Name: FoliageStiffness
Variables.Description: Determines how strong the force that pushes toward the spring's center will be.

Variables.Name: FoliageStiffnessQuadratic
Variables.Description:
Same as FoliageStiffness, but the strength of this force increases with the square of the distance to the spring's center.
	  This force is used to prevent the spring from extending past a certain point due to touch and damage forces.

Variables.Name: FoliageDamping
Variables.Description:
Determines the amount of energy lost by the spring as it oscillates.
	  This force is similar to air friction.

Variables.Name: MaxDamageImpulse
Variables.Description: Clamps the magnitude of each damage force applied.

Variables.Name: MaxTouchImpulse
Variables.Description: Clamps the magnitude of each touch force applied.

Variables.Name: MaxForce
Variables.Description: Clamps the magnitude of combined forces applied each update.
